text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's a half marathon being held<n>nearby, so I
drop by to see if I can<n>pick up any useful tips.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As I'm watching the race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Ines Fujin leaps ahead<n>of the pack
straight from the start!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Move, move, move!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run... with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Strategy for the race? Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I were running, I'd settle in a good<n>position
toward the front, then see<n>how things play out.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think it's best to go right to the front.<n>Then you
can keep growing and<n>growing your lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But if you rush off from the beginning,<n>you may
run out of steam in the latter<n>half.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Do you have a backup plan for that,<n>Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Absolutely, absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: My backup plan is... believing in<n>myself!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll exhaust myself! I<n>just need
to go full speed for the<n>whole race and win!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to capture that moment of<n>triumph and run a
race my family can<n>be proud of!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Now's my chaaaaance!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Closing in on the finish line,<n>Ines Fujin
manages to find yet<n>another gear!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The gap just gets wider and wider!<n>Incredible!
Simply incredible!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I... did it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner is Ines Fujin! She led the<n>whole way
with astounding speed!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm... almost... there!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ines Fujin seems to be out of<n>stamina!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Noooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's been passed by the<n>second-place runner! It
looks like Ines<n>Fujin can't keep up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we've got a comeback<n>victory, folks!
Too bad for Ines Fujin,<n>missing it by just a hair!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What did I say? You can't just run on<n>guts alone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That's fine! Win or lose, I have no<n>regrets!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not cut out for complex stuff, so<n>all I can do is
push forward with all<n>my might.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: On and on and on again. If I do that...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I might just be able to leave behind<n>my own kind
of sparkle.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Going in with a bang and dashing till<n>the very
end—that's the kind of race I<n>want to run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'd like to say you're way out of<n>hand, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INES! INES!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Based on those cheers, I think you<n>may be right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In the long history of the Twinkle<n>Series, I think
it's finally time for<n>someone like you to shine.
